positive: Stylized minimalist illustration of a majestic fox standing in a patch of glowing, bioluminescent deep forest fog. The fox should have clean, sharp lines and a confident, alert posture. Use a limited color palette of deep navy, forest emerald, glowing gold, and charcoal grey. The background elements (trees, fog) should feature strong silhouettes and geometric patterns. Composition must be centered and balanced, suitable for a repeat pattern or main apparel graphic. Crisp, clean vectors, graphic novel aesthetic, high contrast, cinematic studio lighting, ultra detail, perfect for DTG printing.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, words, messy, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, monochrome, muted colors
